commit 4044e4b541a9e5c299215d3bf08f5e7e14ac781d

    databases/libgda5-bdb: Mark DEPRECATED and set EXPIRATION_DATE

    This port depends on databases/db5 which is marked DEPRECATED and set
    EXPIRATION_DATE to 2022-06-30. So also mark it as DEPRECATED and set
    EXPIRATION_DATE to same date of databases/db5.

    PR:             262929
    Approved by:    maintainer timeout
